description: Leather slip-ons from red tape for men with an upraised heel. A spin off from a classic penny loafer, this low-top pair has elasticated slits on the sides of the mouth. Wear this with formal ensembles. Upper Textured leather upper with stitch detailing along the seams of the toe box Reinforced overlay on the heel for support to the ankle Slip on styling with elasticated inserts at the sides of the tongue Fabric lining Padded tongue Soft sockliner for instep comfort Midsole Tough and thick rubber midsole Outsole TPU outsole with an upraised heel Waffle patterned grooved, impact guidance line and a suction point at the heel shoe care Wipe surface with soft, clean, damp cloth Do not machine wash
